caption: The video captures a man practicing basketball in an indoor gymnasium. He is seen dribbling the ball and preparing to shoot towards the hoop. The gym has a polished wooden floor with blue markings, and the walls are painted white with a blue lower section. There are bleachers on the left side of the court, and a staircase leading up to them. The man successfully makes a shot, and the ball goes through the hoop. He then turns towards the camera, holding the ball in one hand and gesturing with the other, possibly explaining or demonstrating something related to his practice session. The environment is well-lit, indicating that it is likely daytime or the gym is well-illuminated by artificial lighting.
